scripts.build:bin:kanna-terminal-recovery: PROFILE="${PROFILE:-debug}"; TARGET="${TARGET:-$(rustc -vV | awk '/^host:/ {print $2}')}"; mkdir -p "../../.build/${TARGET}/${PROFILE}" && bun x pkg ./dist/index.js --targets node18-macos-arm64 --output "../../.build/${TARGET}/${PROFILE}/kanna-terminal-recovery"
